meaning: adj.快乐的,兴高彩烈的,可喜的,令人欢欣的
examples: We're a very joyful people; we're very musical people and we love music.
He called, full of joyful excitement, "hold on!"
Meals unfurl with great ceremony - they are joyful, boisterous and almost inevitably communal.
Joyful, exciting, unique, slightly odd, even a little bit naive - a proper break from the norm.
